flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Norwich University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9k → 2.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Norwich University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.0k → $49.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Norwich University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.0k → $49.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Norwich University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
